sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97976" key="sugxalepai/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συγχᾰλεπαίνω</orth>, <sense id="n97976.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be angry as well</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1496.tlg001:51" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Memn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">51</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
